description: Ownership manifest for scaffold/. Every file copied into a generated workspace at `straper init` time is the runtime baseline and MUST be listed here with classification "baseline" and a justification. Skill-owned assets (task schema, fd designs/config, ship/session-review prompts, worktree cleanup, etc.) do NOT live in scaffold/ — the modules ship them on `straper add`. A test walks scaffold/ and fails on any file missing from this manifest, so a new scaffold file is unmergeable until it is classified.

OWNERSHIP.json.justification: This manifest itself; not copied into workspaces.

claude/settings.json.tmpl.justification: Baseline .claude/settings.json — SessionStart/SessionEnd hooks plus the baseline PreToolUse git-safety hook. Module-contributed hooks (e.g. PostToolUse auto-commit) are wired by their modules on add, not baked in.

claude/hooks/safe-force-push.sh.justification: Baseline git-safety PreToolUse hook: blocks an unsafe `git push --force*` that would overwrite unfetched remote commits. Pure git/jq/bash, no skill dependency — safe in a zero-skill workspace.

scripts/{{agent_name}}.justification: Per-agent CLI shim; renamed to the agent name at init. Core runtime entry, no skill dependency.

scripts/{{agent_name}}.js.justification: Thin per-agent CLI entry that delegates to the registry-driven engine (lib/cli-runtime.js).

scripts/install-cli.sh.justification: Installs the workspace CLI onto PATH; part of the base workspace bootstrap.

scripts/lib/cli-runtime.js.justification: Registry-driven CLI engine. Discovers commands from installed skills and lazily loads handlers; runs with zero skills installed.

scripts/lib/cli-utils.js.justification: Genuinely shared runtime helpers (arg parsing, process/git/slug helpers) imported by the engine and by registry modules. Metrics and task-file mutation were removed to the skills framework and task module respectively.

scripts/lib/skills.sh.justification: Skill framework runtime (discovery, validation, composition). Baseline substrate every module builds on.

scripts/session-start.sh.justification: Boot script. Skill-gated steps (task validation, PR sync, worktree cleanup) are guarded on module presence and skip gracefully when absent.

scripts/session-end.sh.justification: Session-end checklist. Skill-gated steps are guarded on module presence and skip gracefully when absent.

templates/agents/code-reviewer.md.justification: Baseline agent profile (code reviewer) scaffolded into every workspace's agents/ dir. Behavioral-convention content, no skill dependency.

templates/agents/pr-preparer.md.justification: Baseline agent profile (PR preparer) scaffolded into every workspace's agents/ dir. Behavioral-convention content, no skill dependency.

templates/agents/technical-writer.md.justification: Baseline agent profile (technical writer) scaffolded into every workspace's agents/ dir. Behavioral-convention content, no skill dependency.

templates/memory/feedback_always-show-li.justification: Baseline behavioral-convention memory scaffolded into every workspace's memory/ dir.

templates/memory/feedback_audit-the-clas.justification: Baseline behavioral-convention memory scaffolded into every workspace's memory/ dir.

templates/memory/feedback_gloss-ids-in-h.justification: Baseline behavioral-convention memory scaffolded into every workspace's memory/ dir.

templates/memory/feedback_minimal-commen.justification: Baseline behavioral-convention memory scaffolded into every workspace's memory/ dir.

templates/memory/feedback_workers-commit.justification: Baseline behavioral-convention memory scaffolded into every workspace's memory/ dir.
